ItacPersonItem.Notes: Among the father founders of the Accademia degli Intronati. See GUIGUES, sfera geografico-celeste (1700), pp. 81-2, with sonnet in mortem. Vignali authored the controversial dialogue La cazzaria (1525/26), first published between 1530-1540. Critical edition, La cazzaria, ed. and intro. N. Borsellino (1984). English edition, La Cazzaria. The Book of the Prick, ed. and transl. I. F. Moulton (2003, and 2006). Leo Kosuta, `Notes et documents sur Antonio Vignali (1500-1559)`, in Bullettino senese di storia patria (1982), pp. 119-54
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
